data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defense mechanisms against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Includes rate limiting and traffic analysis.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and AES-256 encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Assumes no implicit trust and verifies every interaction.
data.technical_spec: Implementations focus on authentication and continuous monitoring.

data.title: User Account Protection
data.description: Mechanisms to protect user accounts from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Includes two-factor authentication and alerting mechanisms.

data.title: Threat Intelligence
data.description: Analyzes and monitors for cyber threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning to predict and mitigate threats.
